posts.author: Rohan_Selson
posts.text: **Saleem Ahmad, Chairman and Managing Director of Rail Vikas Nigam Limited (RVNL), has assumed additional charge as Chairman and Managing Director of IRCON International Ltd (IRCON), the Navratna CPSE under the Ministry of Railways, effective July 1, 2026. ** There was a lot of speculation happening around merger of RVNL and IRCON. The possibility remains but not absolutely certain yet. However, there was one instance in PSU merger previously, where the common CMD structure was placed (PFC/REC) before the proposal of the merger. This is merely an assumption, can wait and see what is bound to h…
